title: abc9: Fix breaking of SCCs
body:
This correctly handles the case where more than one wire bit is part of an SCC, by checking for this case when rewiring. It also renames the input, rather than the output; to avoid breaking port naming when the output is also a primary output.

Fixes #1487 and fixes #1415; once this is fixed I will be happy making abc9 the default for ECP5 flows - the area reduction is certainly worth it.
